title: ilex dioica var. dioica
intro: Ilex dioica var. dioica, also known as the Holly tree or Common Holly, is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its leaves and berries. The health benefits of Ilex dioica var. dioica include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and berries are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties and health benefits.
